titles.title: At the Foot of the Cross

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: And being found in the form of man, He came to the earth He humbled Himself in love, to show us our worth Obedient to death, even death on the tree At the cross, He poured out His life to set us free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the foot of the cross, I lay it all down My pride and my will, I give up my crown In the shadow of grace, where mercy is found At the foot of the cross, true peace will abound

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Whoever exalts Himself will be brought down low But the humble in heart God's grace will show With a contrite spirit, He hears every plea At the cross, He draws near to those who bends the knee

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For God opposes the proud, but gives grace to the meek In the shadow of His wings, it's His face we seek He lifts up the lowly, the humble find grace And lights our path, so we can finish the race

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come to Me, all who labor, I'll give you My rest The burden is light when we lean on His chest Take the yoke of the Savior, be humble and learn At the cross, where our fleshly ambitions burn

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He washed His disciples feet with humble care The King took the form of a servant beyond compare Whoever would serve must be lowest of all At the cross, we answer His humbling call

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let thus mind be in you, the Spirit urges us search That was in Christ, Who emptied Himself for the Church With every step, may we follow His lead At the cross, we find all we could ever need
